scripts.dev: PORTLESS_PORT=${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} PORTLESS_HTTPS=${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0} pnpm portless:proxy && PORTLESS_PORT=${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} PORTLESS_HTTPS=${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0} portless run --name mfe pnpm dev:apps
scripts.portless:proxy: if [ "${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0}" = "0" ]; then portless proxy start --port ${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} --no-tls; else portless proxy start --port ${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} --https; fi
